Zabs.description: Returns the absolute value of the given number.

ZaddButton.description: Adds a button component to the bot's response.

ZaddCmdReactions.description: Immediately adds one or more emoji reactions to the message that triggered the command.

ZaddEmoji.description: Downloads an image from the given URL and creates a new custom emoji in the current server, optionally returning the usable emoji string.

ZaddField.description: Adds a named field with a value to the specified embed slot, with an optional inline layout flag.

ZaddMentionableSelect.description: Adds a mentionable select menu (users and roles) component to the bot's response.

ZaddMessageReactions.description: Adds one or more emoji reactions to a specific message in the specified channel.

ZaddReactions.description: Queues one or more emoji reactions to be added to the bot's own response message after it is sent.

ZaddRoleSelect.description: Adds a role select menu component to the bot's response.

ZaddSelectMenuOption.description: Adds an option to the current string select menu.

ZaddTextInput.description: Adds a text input field to the current modal.

ZaddUserSelect.description: Adds a user select menu component to the bot's response.

ZafkChannelID.description: Returns the ID of the AFK voice channel in the current guild, or an empty string if none is configured.

ZafkTimeout.description: Returns the AFK timeout in seconds configured for the guild.

ZallMembersCount.description: Returns the total combined member count across all guilds the bot is currently in.

ZallowRoleMentions.description: Restricts role pings in the bot response to only the listed role IDs; if no IDs are given, all role mentions are suppressed.

ZallowUserMentions.description: Restricts user pings in the bot response to only the listed user IDs; if no IDs are given, all user mentions are suppressed.

ZargCount.description: Returns the number of space-separated words in the text.

ZargsCheck.description: Halts execution with an error if the number of whitespace-separated arguments in the message is outside the allowed range.

Zasync.description: Spawns a named background task that runs the provided code block concurrently.

ZauditCount.description: Fetches the guild audit log and returns the number of returned entries.

ZauditEntries.description: Fetches the latest guild audit log entries and returns them as a JSON array.

ZauditEntryAction.description: Returns the action name for the selected audit log entry.

ZauditEntryChanges.description: Returns the change details for the selected audit log entry as JSON.

ZauditEntryID.description: Returns the audit log entry ID for the selected entry.

ZauditEntryReason.description: Returns the reason attached to the selected audit log entry.

ZauditEntryTarget.description: Returns the target ID for the selected audit log entry.

ZauditEntryUser.description: Returns the user ID of the actor who created the selected audit log entry.

ZauditLatest.description: Fetches the most recent guild audit log entry and returns it as a JSON object.

Zauthor.description: Sets the author name on the specified embed slot.

ZauthorIcon.description: Sets the author icon image URL on the specified embed slot, requiring an author to already be set.

ZauthorURL.description: Sets a hyperlink URL on the embed's author name, requiring an author to already be set.

Zawait.description: Blocks execution until the specified background task completes and returns its output.

Zban.description: Bans a user from the guild with an optional reason and optional number of days of messages to delete.

ZblackListIDs.description: Halts command execution if the triggering user's ID matches any of the provided user IDs.

ZblackListRoles.description: Halts command execution if the triggering user holds any role matching the provided role names.

ZblackListRolesIDs.description: Halts command execution if the triggering user holds any role matching the provided role IDs.

ZblackListServers.description: Halts command execution if the current server's guild ID matches any of the provided guild IDs.

ZblackListUsers.description: Halts command execution if the triggering user's username matches any of the provided usernames.

ZboostCount.description: Returns the number of active Nitro boosts the guild has received.

ZboostLevel.description: Returns the current Nitro boost tier of the current guild as a number from 0 to 3.

ZbotCommands.description: Returns an alphabetically sorted list of all loaded command triggers, joined by the specified separator.

ZbotID.description: Returns the bot's own user ID.

ZbotOwnerID.description: Returns the user ID of the bot application's owner.

ZbotTyping.description: Broadcasts a typing indicator in the current channel.

ZbyteCount.description: Returns the number of UTF-8 bytes in the text.

Zcalculate.description: Evaluates a mathematical expression supporting +, -, *, /, %, and ** operators with parentheses and correct operator precedence.

ZcategoryChannels.description: Returns the channels inside a category sorted by position, formatted as names, IDs, mentions, or a count, joined by the specified separator.

ZcategoryCount.description: Returns the number of category channels in the guild.

ZcategoryID.description: Returns the snowflake ID of a category channel in the current guild matched by name.

Zceil.description: Returns the smallest integer greater than or equal to the given number.

ZchangeCooldownTime.description: Overrides the label words used when formatting remaining cooldown times.

ZchangeNickname.description: Changes the guild nickname of the command author or specified user; supports the %username% placeholder in the nickname string.

ZchannelCount.description: Returns the total number of channels in the current guild.

ZchannelCreated.description: Returns the Unix timestamp in seconds at which the channel was created, extracted from its snowflake ID.

ZchannelExists.description: Returns true if a channel with the given ID exists, or false otherwise.

ZchannelID.description: Returns the current channel's ID, or searches for and returns the ID of a guild channel matching the given name.

ZchannelInvites.description: Returns a space-separated list of invite codes for the given channel.

ZchannelName.description: Returns the name of a Discord channel by its ID, falling back to the current channel if no ID is provided.

ZchannelNames.description: Returns a sorted list of all channel names in the guild joined by the specified separator.

ZchannelPosition.description: Returns the position index of a channel within the guild's channel list.

ZchannelTopic.description: Returns the topic of a Discord text channel, or an empty string if none is set.

ZchannelType.description: Returns the type of a channel as a string such as text, voice, category, announcement, stage, forum, thread, or dm.

ZchannelWebhooks.description: Returns a space-separated list of webhook URLs configured for the given channel.

ZcharCount.description: Returns the number of Unicode characters in the text.

ZcheckCondition.description: Evaluates a condition expression and returns true or false.

ZcheckContains.description: Returns true if the text contains any of the provided words, using a case-insensitive comparison.

ZcheckUserPerms.description: Returns true if the specified user has all of the given guild permissions.

Zclear.description: Bulk-deletes up to 100 recent messages in the current channel, with an optional user filter and configurable handling of pinned messages.

ZclearReactions.description: Removes a specific emoji reaction from a message, or clears all reactions when !all is passed as the emoji.

Zcolor.description: Sets the accent color of the specified embed slot using a hex color code.

ZcolorRole.description: Sets the color of an existing role to the specified hex color code.

ZcommandName.description: Returns the name of the currently executing command, falling back to the trigger string if no command name is set.

ZcommandsCount.description: Returns the total number of commands loaded from the commands directory.

ZcommandTrigger.description: Returns the trigger string of the currently executing command.

Zcooldown.description: Applies a per-user per-server cooldown that blocks re-use of the current command until the duration expires.

ZcreateChannel.description: Creates a new channel in the current guild with the specified name, type, and optional parent category.

ZcreateEvent.description: Creates a new scheduled voice event in the server and returns its event ID.

ZcreateForumTag.description: Adds a new available tag to a forum channel with an optional emoji and moderation flag.

ZcreateInvite.description: Creates an invite for the specified channel and returns its code.

ZcreatePost.description: Creates a new forum post in a forum channel and returns its thread ID.

ZcreateRole.description: Creates a new role in the guild with the specified name and optional color, hoist, and mentionable settings.

ZcreationDate.description: Returns the creation date derived from any Discord snowflake ID, formatted according to the optional format string.

ZcropText.description: Crops text to a maximum number of characters and appends an ending string if the text was truncated.

ZcustomEmoji.description: Returns the usable Discord emoji string for a server custom emoji looked up by name.

ZcustomID.description: Returns the custom ID of the current interaction.

Zdate.description: Returns the current date in YYYY-MM-DD format using the active timezone.

Zday.description: Returns the current day of the month using the active timezone.

Zdeafen.description: Server-deafens the specified user so they cannot hear any audio in voice channels.

Zdefer.description: Defers the interaction response, showing a thinking indicator and extending the response window to 15 minutes.

Zdelay.description: Executes a block of code after a specified duration (e.g., 10s, 1m).

ZdeleteChannels.description: Deletes one or more channels by their IDs.

ZdeleteChannelsByName.description: Deletes all channels in the current guild whose names match any of the provided names.

ZdeleteEvent.description: Deletes a scheduled event from the current server by its event ID.

ZdeleteForumTag.description: Removes an available tag from a forum channel by its tag ID.

ZdeleteInvite.description: Deletes a Discord invite by its code.

ZdeleteMessage.description: Deletes the specified message from a channel.

ZdeleteRole.description: Permanently deletes the specified role from the guild.

ZdeleteSticker.description: Deletes a guild sticker from the current server by its sticker ID.

Zdescription.description: Sets the description text on the specified embed slot.

ZdisplayName.description: Returns the display name of the command author or specified user; use server for the guild nickname or global for the Discord global name.

Zdiv.description: Divides the first value by each subsequent divisor in sequence and returns the result.

Zdm.description: Sends a direct message with the specified content to the given user.

ZdmChannelID.description: Returns the ID of the DM channel between the bot and a user, creating it if it does not yet exist.

ZeditButton.description: Edits a button on an existing message by its custom ID.

ZeditChannelPerms.description: Edits permission overwrites for a user or role on a channel, using + to allow, - to deny, and / to neutralize each named permission.

ZeditEvent.description: Edits one or more fields of an existing scheduled event by its ID.

ZeditForumTag.description: Edits the name or moderation flag of an existing forum tag by its ID.

ZeditMessage.description: Replaces the text content of an existing message in a channel.

ZeditSelectMenu.description: Edits the properties of a string select menu on an existing message.

ZeditSelectMenuOption.description: Replaces the options on an existing select menu with a single updated option.

ZeditSplitText.description: Replaces the element at the given 1-based index in the current split text with a new value.

ZeditThread.description: Edits one or more properties of an existing thread such as name, archived state, archive duration, lock status, and slowmode.

ZemojiExists.description: Returns true if a custom emoji with the given ID exists in the current server, or false otherwise.

ZemojiName.description: Returns the name of a custom emoji in the current server looked up by its ID.

ZemoteCount.description: Returns the total number of custom emojis in the current server.

Zenabled.description: Halts command execution with an optional error message when the condition is false, or continues silently when it is true.

ZendsWith.description: Returns true if the text ends with the specified suffix.

Zephemeral.description: Marks the current slash command response as ephemeral so it is only visible to the invoking user.

Zerror.description: Halts execution and displays a custom user-facing error message.

Zeval.description: Parses and executes a ZBR code string at runtime, returning the concatenated text output.

ZeventChannel.description: Returns the channel ID associated with a scheduled event, or an empty string for external events.

ZeventCount.description: Returns the total number of scheduled events in the current server.

ZeventDescription.description: Returns the description of a scheduled event by its event ID, or an empty string if no description is set.

ZeventEnd.description: Returns the end time of a scheduled event as a Unix timestamp string, or an empty string if no end time is set.

ZeventName.description: Returns the name of a scheduled event by its event ID.

ZeventStart.description: Returns the start time of a scheduled event as a Unix timestamp string.

ZeventStatus.description: Returns the current status of a scheduled event as one of: scheduled, active, completed, or cancelled.

ZeventSubscribers.description: Returns the number of users subscribed to a scheduled event.

ZexecutionTime.description: Returns the number of milliseconds elapsed since the current command began executing.

Zfloor.description: Returns the largest integer less than or equal to the given number.

Zfooter.description: Sets the footer text on the specified embed slot.

ZfooterIcon.description: Sets the footer icon image URL on the specified embed slot, requiring a footer to already be set.

ZforJson.description: Iterates over a JSON array at the given key path within the current parsed JSON object, executing the code block for each element.

ZforSplit.description: Iterates over the elements produced by a prior ZtextSplit call, executing the code block for each element with ZloopIndex and ZloopValue populated.

ZforumPostCount.description: Returns the number of currently active posts in a forum channel.

ZforumPosts.description: Returns a space-separated list of active post IDs in a forum channel.

ZforumTagEmoji.description: Returns the emoji associated with a forum tag.

ZforumTagID.description: Returns the ID of a forum tag matching the given name, or an empty string if not found.

ZforumTagModerated.description: Returns true if the specified forum tag is restricted to moderators, or false otherwise.

ZforumTags.description: Returns a space-separated list of available tag names in a forum channel.

ZfromTimestamp.description: Formats a Unix timestamp into a human-readable date/time string using the active timezone and the specified format.

ZgetAttachments.description: Returns attachment URLs from the triggering message joined by newlines, or the single URL at the specified 1-based index.

ZgetBanReason.description: Returns the ban reason for the specified user, optionally checked against a different guild.

ZgetChannelVar.description: Returns the value of a channel-scoped variable, defaulting to the current channel if not specified.

ZgetCooldown.description: Returns the remaining cooldown time in seconds for the current user and command.

ZgetEmbedData.description: Fetches the specified field from an embed on an existing Discord message, where type is one of title, description, footer, color, image, or timestamp.

ZgetMentionableSelectUserCount.description: Returns the number of users and roles selected in a mentionable select menu interaction.

ZgetMentionableSelectUserID.description: Returns the selected user or role ID at the given 1-based index from a mentionable select menu interaction.

ZgetMentionableSelectUserIDs.description: Returns all selected user and role IDs from a mentionable select menu interaction joined by the given separator.

ZgetMessage.description: Fetches the specified field from a Discord message, where type is one of content, authorID, username, or avatar.

ZgetReactions.description: Returns a separator-joined list of usernames of users who reacted to a specific message with the given emoji.

ZgetRoleSelectRoleCount.description: Returns the number of roles selected in a role select menu interaction.

ZgetRoleSelectRoleID.description: Returns the selected role ID at the given 1-based index from a role select menu interaction.

ZgetRoleSelectRoleIDs.description: Returns all selected role IDs from a role select menu interaction joined by the given separator.

ZgetServerVar.description: Returns the value of a server-scoped variable, defaulting to the current server if not specified.

ZgetSlowmode.description: Returns the slowmode rate limit in seconds for the given channel, or 0 if no slowmode is set.

ZgetTextSplitIndex.description: Returns the 1-based index of the first element in the split that matches the given value, or -1 if not found.

ZgetTextSplitLength.description: Returns the number of elements in the current split text.

ZgetTimestamp.description: Returns the current Unix timestamp in the specified unit: seconds (s), milliseconds (ms), or nanoseconds (ns).

ZgetUserSelectUserCount.description: Returns the number of users selected in a user select menu interaction.

ZgetUserSelectUserID.description: Returns the selected user ID at the given 1-based index from a user select menu interaction.

ZgetUserSelectUserIDs.description: Returns all selected user IDs from a user select menu interaction joined by the given separator.

ZgetUserVar.description: Returns the value of a user-scoped variable, defaulting to the current user and server if not specified.

ZgetVar.description: Returns the value of a global bot-wide variable by name.

ZglobalCooldown.description: Applies a per-user global cooldown across all servers, preventing the user from running the command until the duration expires.

ZguildBanner.description: Returns the banner URL of the guild, or an empty string if no banner is set.

ZguildExists.description: Returns true if a guild with the given ID is accessible by the bot, or false otherwise.

ZguildID.description: Returns the ID of the current guild.

ZhasRole.description: Returns true if the specified user currently has the given role.

ZhighestRole.description: Returns the ID of the highest-position role held by the specified user, defaulting to the author.

ZhighestRoleWithPerms.description: Returns the ID of the highest-position role in the guild that has all of the specified permissions.

Zhour.description: Returns the current hour using the active timezone.

ZhttpAddHeader.description: Adds a custom HTTP header by name and value that will be sent with all subsequent HTTP requests in the current execution.

ZhttpDelete.description: Sends an HTTP DELETE request to the specified URL with an optional request body and stores the response.

ZhttpGet.description: Sends an HTTP GET request to the specified URL and stores the response for access via ZhttpStatus and ZhttpResult.

ZhttpGetHeader.description: Returns the value of a custom HTTP header previously registered via ZhttpAddHeader, or an empty string if it does not exist.

ZhttpPatch.description: Sends an HTTP PATCH request to the specified URL with an optional request body and stores the response.

ZhttpPost.description: Sends an HTTP POST request to the specified URL with an optional request body and stores the response.

ZhttpPut.description: Sends an HTTP PUT request to the specified URL with an optional request body and stores the response.

ZhttpRemoveHeader.description: Removes a custom HTTP header previously set via ZhttpAddHeader so it is no longer sent with subsequent requests.

ZhttpResult.description: Returns the response body of the last HTTP request, optionally navigating into it as a JSON path where each argument is one level deeper.

ZhttpStatus.description: Returns the HTTP status code of the last HTTP request made in the current execution.

Zif.description: Evaluates a condition and returns the then-branch value if true, or the optional else-branch value if false.

ZignoreChannels.description: Halts execution if the current channel matches any of the provided channel IDs.

Zimage.description: Sets the large image URL on the specified embed slot.

ZindexOf.description: Returns the 1-based character position of the first occurrence of a search string in the text, or 0 if not found.

ZinputValue.description: Returns the submitted value of a modal text input field by its field ID.

ZinviteInfo.description: Returns a specific field of a Discord invite by its code, where type is one of uses, channel, creationDate, inviter, or isTemporary.

ZisAdmin.description: Returns true if the command author or specified user has the Administrator permission in the current guild, otherwise false.

ZisBanned.description: Returns true if the specified user is currently banned from the guild.

ZisBoolean.description: Returns true if the value is exactly the string true or false, otherwise returns false.

ZisBooster.description: Returns true if the command author or specified user is currently boosting the current guild, otherwise false.

ZisBot.description: Returns true if the command author or specified user is a bot account, otherwise false.

ZisEmojiAnimated.description: Returns true if the custom emoji with the given ID is animated, or false if it is static.

ZisHoisted.description: Returns true if the given role is displayed separately in the member list, defaulting to the author's top role if no ID is provided.

ZisInteger.description: Returns true if the value parses as a whole number with no decimal point, otherwise returns false.

ZisInVoice.description: Returns true if the specified user is currently connected to a voice channel, defaulting to the author.

ZisMentionable.description: Returns true if the given role can be mentioned by all users, defaulting to the author's top role if no ID is provided.

ZisMentioned.description: Returns true if the specified user is mentioned in the triggering message, defaulting to the command author.

ZisMessageEdited.description: Returns true or false for whether a message has been edited, or returns its edit timestamp when type is timestamp.

ZisModerator.description: Returns true if the command author or specified user has the Moderate Members permission in the current guild, otherwise false.

ZisNSFW.description: Returns true if the given channel is marked as NSFW, or false otherwise.

ZisNumber.description: Returns true if the value parses as any numeric value including decimals, otherwise returns false.

ZisSlash.description: Returns true if the current command was triggered as a slash command, otherwise returns false.

ZisTimedOut.description: Returns true if the specified user currently has an active communication timeout.

ZisUserDMEnabled.description: Returns true if a DM channel can be successfully opened with the command author or specified user, otherwise false.

ZisValidHex.description: Returns true if the value is a valid six-digit hex color code, otherwise returns false.

ZjoinSplitText.description: Joins all elements in the current split text into a single string using the given separator.

ZjsonArray.description: Creates an empty JSON array at the specified key path in the working JSON object.

ZjsonArrayAppend.description: Appends a value to the end of the array at the specified key path in the working JSON object.

ZjsonArrayCount.description: Returns the number of elements in the array at the specified key path in the working JSON object.

ZjsonArrayIndex.description: Returns the 0-based index of the first occurrence of a value in the array at the specified key path, or -1 if not found.

ZjsonArrayPop.description: Removes and returns the last element of the array at the specified key path in the working JSON object.

ZjsonArrayReverse.description: Reverses the array at the specified key path in the working JSON object in place.

ZjsonArrayShift.description: Removes and returns the first element of the array at the specified key path in the working JSON object.

ZjsonArraySort.description: Sorts the array at the specified key path in ascending order, comparing numbers numerically and other values lexicographically.

ZjsonArrayUnshift.description: Inserts a value at the beginning of the array at the specified key path in the working JSON object.

ZjsonClear.description: Clears the working JSON object, discarding all stored data for the current execution.

ZjsonExists.description: Returns true if the specified key path exists in the working JSON object, or false otherwise.

ZjsonGet.description: Returns the value at the specified key path in the working JSON object, returning an empty string if the path does not exist.

ZjsonJoinArray.description: Joins all elements of the array at the specified key path into a single string using the provided separator.

ZjsonParse.description: Parses a JSON string and stores it as the working JSON object for the current execution.

ZjsonPretty.description: Serializes the working JSON object to a pretty-printed JSON string using the specified number of spaces for indentation.

ZjsonSet.description: Sets a value at the specified key path in the working JSON object, automatically inferring the value type.

ZjsonStringify.description: Serializes the working JSON object to a compact JSON string.

ZjsonUnset.description: Removes the key at the specified path from the working JSON object.

Zkick.description: Kicks a user from the guild with an optional reason.

ZlastMessageID.description: Returns the ID of the last message sent in the given channel, or an empty string if none exists.

ZlastPinTimestamp.description: Returns the date of the most recently pinned message in the channel formatted as YYYY-MM-DD, or an empty string if no pins exist.

ZlinesCount.description: Returns the number of lines in the text, returning zero for an empty string.

ZlistVar.description: Returns all global variable names joined by the given separator.

ZloopIndex.description: Returns the current 1-based iteration index of the active loop, or 0 if called outside a loop.

ZloopValue.description: Returns the current element value of the active loop, or an empty string if called outside a loop.

Zlowercase.description: Converts all characters in the text to lowercase.

ZlowestRole.description: Returns the ID of the lowest-position non-everyone role held by the specified user, defaulting to the author.

ZlowestRoleWithPerms.description: Returns the ID of the lowest-position role in the guild that has all of the specified permissions.

Zmax.description: Returns the largest value among all provided numbers.

ZmembersCount.description: Returns the total number of members in the guild, or the count filtered by presence status.

Zmentioned.description: Returns the user ID of the Nth mentioned user in the triggering message, optionally falling back to the author ID.

Zmessage.description: Returns the full message content after the command trigger, or the Nth space-separated word when an index is provided.

ZmessageID.description: Returns the ID of the message that triggered the current command execution.

ZmessageLink.description: Builds and returns a Discord jump URL for the specified message, using the current channel if no channel ID is provided.

Zmin.description: Returns the smallest value among all provided numbers.

Zminute.description: Returns the current minute using the active timezone.

ZmodifyChannel.description: Modifies one or more properties of an existing channel such as its name, topic, NSFW flag, position, and parent category.

ZmodifyRole.description: Modifies the name, color, hoist, and mentionable settings of an existing role, leaving any unspecified fields unchanged.

ZmodifyRolePerms.description: Adds or removes permissions from a role using prefixed operations where + grants, - denies, and / resets a permission.

Zmodulo.description: Returns the remainder of dividing the dividend by the divisor.

Zmonth.description: Returns the current month number using the active timezone.

Zmulti.description: Returns the product of all provided numbers.

Zmute.description: Server-mutes the specified user in all voice channels.

ZnewModal.description: Creates a modal dialog to collect text input from the user.

ZnewSelectMenu.description: Creates a string select menu on the bot's response.

Znot.description: Inverts a boolean value, returning false for true or 1, and true for anything else.

ZnumberSeparator.description: Formats a number string by inserting thousands separators, defaulting to a comma.

ZonlyAdmin.description: Halts execution unless the author has the Administrator permission in the guild.

ZonlyBotChannelPerms.description: Halts execution unless the bot has all of the specified permissions in the given channel.

ZonlyBotPerms.description: Halts execution unless the bot has all of the specified guild permissions.

ZonlyForCategories.description: Halts execution unless the current channel belongs to one of the specified category IDs.

ZonlyForChannels.description: Halts execution unless the current channel matches one of the specified channel IDs.

ZonlyForIDs.description: Halts execution unless the author's user ID matches one of the specified IDs.

ZonlyForRoleIDs.description: Halts execution unless the author has at least one of the specified role IDs.

ZonlyForRoles.description: Halts execution unless the author has at least one of the specified roles matched by name.

ZonlyForServers.description: Halts execution unless the current guild ID matches one of the specified server IDs.

ZonlyForUsers.description: Halts execution unless the author's username matches one of the specified usernames.

ZonlyIf.description: Halts execution with a custom error message if the given condition evaluates to false.

ZonlyIfMessageContains.description: Halts execution with an error message unless the provided message text contains all of the specified words.

ZonlyNSFW.description: Halts execution unless the current channel is marked as NSFW.

ZonlyPerms.description: Halts execution unless the author has all of the specified guild permissions.

Zoption.description: Returns the value of a named slash command option by its key.

ZpadLeft.description: Pads the text on the left with a repeated character until it reaches the specified width, defaulting to a space.

ZpadRight.description: Pads the text on the right with a repeated character until it reaches the specified width, defaulting to a space.

ZparentID.description: Returns the ID of the parent category of the given channel, or an empty string if the channel has no parent.

Zping.description: Returns the bot's gateway latency in milliseconds.

ZpinMessage.description: Pins the specified message in a channel, defaulting to the current channel if no channel ID is provided.

ZpostTags.description: Returns a space-separated list of tag IDs currently applied to a forum post thread.

Zpow.description: Returns the base raised to the power of the exponent.

ZpublishMessage.description: Crossposts a message from an announcement channel to all subscribed channels.

Zrandom.description: Returns a random integer between min and max (inclusive).

ZrandomCategoryID.description: Returns the ID of a randomly selected category channel in the current server.

ZrandomChannelID.description: Returns the ID of a randomly selected text channel in the current server.

ZrandomGuildID.description: Returns the ID of a randomly selected guild that the bot is a member of.

ZrandomMention.description: Returns a formatted mention string for a randomly selected member in the current server.

ZrandomRoleID.description: Returns the ID of a randomly selected role in the current server.

ZrandomString.description: Returns a random alphanumeric string of the specified length.

ZrandomText.description: Returns one of the provided text values chosen at random.

ZrandomUser.description: Returns the display name of a randomly selected member in the current server.

ZrandomUserID.description: Returns the user ID of a randomly selected member in the current server.

ZregexMatch.description: Returns true if the text matches the given regular expression pattern.

ZregexReplace.description: Replaces all substrings in the text that match the regular expression pattern with the specified replacement.

ZremoveAllComponents.description: Removes all components from a message, defaulting to the triggering message.

ZremoveButtons.description: Removes all buttons from a message by clearing all its components, defaulting to the triggering message.

ZremoveComponent.description: Removes a specific component by its custom ID from a message, defaulting to the triggering message.

ZremoveEmoji.description: Deletes a custom emoji from the current server by its ID.

ZremoveLinks.description: Removes all whitespace-delimited tokens beginning with http:// or https:// from the text.

ZremoveSplitTextElement.description: Removes the element at the given 1-based index from the current split text.

Zrepeat.description: Executes the given code block N times and returns each non-empty output joined by newlines.

ZreplaceText.description: Replaces occurrences of a sample substring in text with a new string, with an optional limit on the number of replacements.

ZrepliedMessageID.description: Returns the ID of the message that the specified or triggering message is replying to.

Zreply.description: Signals that the bot's response should be sent as a reply to the triggering message.

ZreplyIn.description: Schedules a reply to the triggering message after the specified duration has elapsed.

ZresetChannelVar.description: Deletes the given channel variable across every channel.

ZresetServerVar.description: Deletes the given server variable across every server.

ZresetUserVar.description: Deletes the given user variable for every user in the current server.

ZroleColor.description: Returns the hex color code of a role, defaulting to the author's top role if no ID is provided.

ZroleCount.description: Returns the total number of roles in the current guild.

ZroleExists.description: Returns true if the given role ID exists in the guild, defaulting to the author's top role if no ID is provided.

ZroleGrant.description: Grants or removes one or more roles from a user using prefixed operations where + adds and - removes a role.

ZroleID.description: Returns the command author's top role ID, or searches for and returns the ID of a guild role matching the given name.

ZroleMemberCount.description: Returns the number of members who have the given role, defaulting to the author's highest role.

ZroleMembers.description: Returns a space-separated list of user IDs for all members who have the given role, defaulting to the author's highest role.

ZroleName.description: Returns the name of a role by its ID, defaulting to the author's top role if no ID is provided.

ZroleNames.description: Returns all role names in the guild sorted by position from highest to lowest, joined by the given separator.

ZrolePerms.description: Returns the permission names granted to a role joined by the given separator, defaulting to the author's top role if no ID is provided.

ZrolePosition.description: Returns the hierarchy position of a role, defaulting to the author's top role if no ID is provided.

Zround.description: Rounds a number to the specified number of decimal places, defaulting to zero decimal places.

ZrulesChannelID.description: Returns the ID of the rules channel in the guild, or an empty string if none is configured.

Zsecond.description: Returns the current second using the active timezone.

ZsendEmbed.description: Sends the embed at the specified slot index to a Discord channel, optionally returning the sent message ID.

ZsendMessage.description: Sends a message to the specified channel (or the current channel if omitted), and optionally returns the sent message's ID.

ZsendWebhook.description: Sends the embed at the specified slot index via a Discord webhook URL, optionally returning the message ID.

ZserverChannels.description: Returns a separator-joined list of channel IDs for the specified server.

ZserverCooldown.description: Applies a server-wide cooldown that prevents anyone in the server from running the command until the duration expires.

ZserverCount.description: Returns the number of guilds the bot is currently in.

ZserverDescription.description: Returns the description of the guild, or an empty string if none is set.

ZserverEmojis.description: Returns the custom emojis of the guild as formatted emoji strings joined by the specified separator.

ZserverEvents.description: Returns a space-separated list of all scheduled event IDs in the current server.

ZserverIcon.description: Returns the icon URL of the guild, or an empty string if no icon is set.

ZserverInvite.description: Returns the URL of the first available invite for the guild, or an empty string if none exist.

ZserverName.description: Returns the name of the guild.

ZserverNames.description: Returns a list of the names of all guilds the bot is in, optionally limited to a count and joined by the separator.

ZserverOwner.description: Returns the user ID of the guild owner.

ZserverRoles.description: Returns a separator-joined list of role IDs for the specified server.

ZserverStickers.description: Returns a space-separated list of all sticker IDs in the current server.

ZserverVerificationLevel.description: Returns the verification level of the current guild as a string such as none, low, medium, high, or very_high.

ZsetChannelVar.description: Sets the value of a channel-scoped variable, defaulting to the current channel if not specified.

ZsetPostTags.description: Replaces all applied tags on a forum post thread with the specified tag IDs.

ZsetServerVar.description: Sets the value of a server-scoped variable, defaulting to the current server if not specified.

ZsetUserRoles.description: Replaces all roles of the specified user with exactly the provided list of role IDs.

ZsetUserVar.description: Sets the value of a user-scoped variable, defaulting to the current user and server if not specified.

ZsetVar.description: Sets the value of a global bot-wide variable by name.

ZslashCommandsCount.description: Returns the number of slash-type commands loaded from the commands directory.

ZslashID.description: Returns the Discord application command ID for the specified slash command name, or for the currently executing slash command if no name is provided.

ZslowMode.description: Sets the slowmode rate limit on a channel to the specified duration (0 or 0s disables it).

Zsort.description: Sorts a variadic list of numbers in ascending or descending order and returns up to a specified count joined by a separator.

ZsplitText.description: Returns a single element from the stored split text by 1-based index, or use < for the first or > for the last element.

Zsqrt.description: Returns the square root of the given non-negative number.

ZstageCreate.description: Creates a new stage instance in the specified stage channel with the given topic.

ZstageDelete.description: Ends and deletes the stage instance associated with the specified stage channel.

ZstageEdit.description: Edits the topic of an existing stage instance in the specified stage channel.

ZstageTopic.description: Returns the current topic of the stage instance in the specified stage channel.

ZstartsWith.description: Returns true if the text begins with the specified prefix.

ZstartThread.description: Creates a new thread in the specified channel, optionally attaching it to an existing message, and returns the thread ID if requested.

ZstickerCount.description: Returns the total number of stickers in the current server.

ZstickerDescription.description: Returns the description of a guild sticker by its sticker ID, or an empty string if no description is set.

ZstickerEmoji.description: Returns the related emoji tag for a guild sticker as a string.

ZstickerExists.description: Returns true if a sticker with the given ID exists in the current server, or false otherwise.

ZstickerID.description: Returns the ID of a guild sticker matching the given name, or an empty string if not found.

ZstickerName.description: Returns the name of a guild sticker by its sticker ID.

Zstop.description: Halts execution silently without producing any output or error message.

Zsub.description: Subtracts each subsequent number from the first value and returns the result.

Zsubstring.description: Returns a portion of the text starting at a 1-based character position, optionally limited to a specified length.

Zsum.description: Returns the sum of all provided numbers.

ZsuppressErrors.description: Activates error suppression for the current execution, optionally showing a custom message or a specific embed slot instead of the real error.

ZsystemChannelID.description: Returns the ID of the system messages channel in the current guild, or an empty string if none is configured.

ZtextSplit.description: Splits a string by a separator and stores the resulting elements for use with other split functions.

ZthreadAddMember.description: Adds a user to the specified thread by their user ID.

ZthreadArchived.description: Returns true if the thread is archived.

ZthreadLocked.description: Returns true if the thread is locked.

ZthreadMessageCount.description: Returns the number of messages in the specified thread.

ZthreadParentID.description: Returns the parent channel ID of the thread, or empty string.

ZthreadRemoveMember.description: Removes a user from the specified thread by their user ID.

ZthreadUserCount.description: Returns the total number of members currently in the specified thread.

Zthumbnail.description: Sets the thumbnail image URL on the specified embed slot.

Ztime.description: Sets the active timezone for all subsequent date/time functions, or returns the current timezone name when called with no argument.

ZtimeDiff.description: Returns the absolute difference between two Unix timestamps in the specified unit such as seconds, minutes, hours, or days.

Ztimeout.description: Applies a communication timeout to a user for the specified duration, up to a maximum of 28 days.

Ztimestamp.description: Enables the current UTC timestamp display on the specified embed slot.

Ztitle.description: Sets the title text on the specified embed slot.

Ztitlecase.description: Converts the first letter of each word to uppercase and all remaining letters to lowercase.

ZtitleURL.description: Sets a hyperlink URL on the embed's title, requiring a title to already be set on that slot.

ZtrimContent.description: Collapses multiple consecutive spaces into a single space and trims leading and trailing whitespace.

ZtrimSpace.description: Removes leading and trailing whitespace from the text.

ZtryRun.description: Evaluates the code block and falls back to the fallback block if any error occurs.

Zunban.description: Removes the ban for the specified user from the guild.

Zundeafen.description: Removes the server deafen from the specified user so they can hear audio in voice channels again.

Zunmute.description: Removes the server mute from the specified user in all voice channels.

ZunpinMessage.description: Unpins the specified message in a channel, defaulting to the current channel if no channel ID is provided.

ZuntimeOut.description: Removes the active communication timeout from a user, restoring their ability to send messages.

Zuppercase.description: Converts all characters in the text to uppercase.

Zuptime.description: Returns the bot's uptime since startup, formatted as a human-readable string of days, hours, minutes, and seconds.

Zurl.description: Encodes or decodes a string using URL percent-encoding based on the specified mode.

ZuseChannel.description: Redirects all bot output for the current command execution to the specified channel.

ZuserAvatar.description: Returns the avatar URL of the command author, or of the specified user if a user ID is provided.

ZuserBadge.description: Returns the public profile badges of the command author or specified user as a separated list.

ZuserBanner.description: Returns the banner URL of the command author or specified user, or an empty string if no banner is set.

ZuserBannerColor.description: Returns the banner accent color of the command author or specified user as a hex string, or an empty string if none is set.

ZuserExists.description: Returns true if the given user ID resolves to a valid Discord user, or false otherwise.

ZuserID.description: Returns the command author's user ID, or searches for and returns the user ID of a guild member matching the given name.

ZuserJoined.description: Returns the date when the command author or specified user joined the current guild, formatted according to the optional format string.

Zusername.description: Returns the username of the command author, or of the specified user if a user ID is provided.

ZuserPerms.description: Returns the guild permissions held by the command author or specified user, up to the given amount, joined by the separator.

ZuserReacted.description: Returns true if the specified user reacted to a message with the given emoji, or false otherwise.

ZuserRoles.description: Returns a list of the specified user's roles joined by the given separator, with output format controlled by returnType.

ZuserSelfDeafened.description: Returns true if the specified user has deafened themselves in voice, defaulting to the author.

ZuserSelfMuted.description: Returns true if the specified user has muted themselves in voice, defaulting to the author.

ZuserServerAvatar.description: Returns the guild-specific avatar URL of the command author or specified user, falling back to their global avatar or default avatar if none is set.

ZuserServerDeafened.description: Returns true if the specified user has been server-deafened by a moderator, defaulting to the author.

ZuserServerMuted.description: Returns true if the specified user has been server-muted by a moderator, defaulting to the author.

ZuserStatus.description: Returns the online status of the command author or specified user, or their custom status text if customStatus is true.

ZuserStreaming.description: Returns true if the specified user is currently streaming in a voice channel, defaulting to the author.

ZuserVoiceChannel.description: Returns the ID of the voice channel the specified user is in, or an empty string if they are not in voice.

Zvar.description: Gets or sets a temporary in-memory variable that persists only for the duration of the current command execution.

ZvarExistError.description: Halts execution with a custom error message if the specified global variable does not exist.

ZvarExists.description: Returns true if a global variable with the given name exists, otherwise returns false.

ZvoiceBitrate.description: Returns the bitrate in kbps of the specified voice channel, defaulting to the author's current voice channel.

ZvoiceEmpty.description: Returns true if the specified voice channel has zero members; defaults to the author's current voice channel.

ZvoiceFull.description: Returns true if the specified voice channel's member count equals its user limit; defaults to the author's current voice channel.

ZvoiceKick.description: Disconnects the specified user from their current voice channel.

ZvoiceMemberCount.description: Returns the number of users currently in the specified voice channel, defaulting to the author's current voice channel.

ZvoiceMembers.description: Returns a space-separated list of user IDs currently in the specified voice channel, defaulting to the author's current voice channel.

ZvoiceMove.description: Moves a user from their current voice channel to the specified target voice channel.

ZvoiceNew.description: Returns the new voice channel ID from the onVoiceStateUpdate event context (the channel the user moved to).

ZvoiceOld.description: Returns the previous voice channel ID from the onVoiceStateUpdate event context (the channel the user was in before).

ZvoiceUserLimit.description: Returns the maximum number of users allowed in a voice or stage channel, or 0 if there is no limit.

ZwebhookCreate.description: Creates a webhook in the specified channel and returns its full URL.

ZwebhookDelete.description: Deletes a webhook identified by its full Discord webhook URL.

Zyear.description: Returns the current four-digit year using the active timezone.
